title: Dukette's Planks
description: This is a resourcepack that adjusts the textures of wood, being a reimagination of what it could be based on personal subjective taste, while still staying faithful to vanilla minecraft.
body: # Dukette's Planks --- ### Have you ever thought the vanilla wood blocks could use a reiteration? Does the consistent and even planks, with muted colors, bore you? Have you ever wanted to build with a certain wood type, but find the colors unappealing? Well, maybe this is for you! I am trying my best to remain vanilla in the texturing and coloring, while putting my own touch on all blocks wooden. My goals with this resourcepack is to fix small issues with the models and textures, giving them all slightly my shape, unique textures and colors that are more easily workable, while looking close to the original types. Fence posts and fence gates doesn't simply just copy a template of the normal plank texture; they have their own textures instead. The buttons look more like buttons, hinges will move when gates or doors gets opened or closed, planks will feel more as if someone used the wood they have laying around to build the blocks, and potentially more <3 --- ![Village 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gcNempaJ/images/1bdfe2cf1f3cb5abec8774a5f0fa1b54473b46ac.png) Plains village without the resourcepack, and with the resourcepack turned on. --- **Pictures showing progress of the resourcepack can be found by checking out the gallery <3** Do you want to feel like a knight, both with new armors and halberd tools? Do you want special mob armors? Then please check out my profile for more :D Are you looking for even more resourcepacks, or maybe skins, or one of my builds? Then check out my planetminecraft account! Other links:
